title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Robin, Luffy, Jinbe, Unknown person #15 as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I couldn't take it all in...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My resolve wasn't strong enough...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I stay ignorant, I'll never be able to understand... right, Dad?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wow, they really totaled the place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Even though they were born here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stella... where the blazes did ya get to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Klank

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ARGH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ka-Boom!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ku ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: An insane scoop just came in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Gacha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government intends to assimilate the beloved Dr. vegapunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They plan to kill the world's greatest genius!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: It's like Ohara all over again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But they've miscalculated this time! The good doctor is far too popular for this to fly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's loved as the man that develops energy to light up towns the world over!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fortunately, guess who else happens to be on the scene...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Navy SKIRMISH AT EGGHEAD!!!"

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: "Emperor Straw hat Luffy takes vegapunk hostage!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure the government will appreciate that spin. Go collect their contribution.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: THAT'S OUT- RAGEOUS!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: luffy-san would never do something like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The economic journal is such a rag!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She actually borrowed my clothes!:) I'm never washing them again!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep your voice down!! What if there's a WireTap snail around here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The govern- Ment will erase us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, more-chan took us in! Don't be rude!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmph! Big talk for a girl who was bawling her eyes out yesterday!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't look down on me or tell me how to do my job!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: My words can shake the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, news isn't about fact or fiction, it's about entertainment!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
